invariants.description: Read a file before editing it
invariants.message: You're editing {file} without reading it first in this session.

invariants.description: Config/DI changes must be verified at runtime — dotnet build is not validation
invariants.message: You changed {file}. Verify at runtime (dotnet run / start the service) — dotnet build alone is not sufficient for config/DI changes.

checkpoints.message: You've made {calls_since_user} tool calls without user input. Pause and state what you're doing and why before continuing.
You've made {consecutive_edits} consecutive edits without reading any files. Pause and verify your changes are correct.
